name: Horde Hunters
short_description: Slay hordes of enemies on thrilling missions to save the humanity from a looming demon onslaught.
detailed_description:
Horde Hunters is an adrenaline pumping horde survival game that pushes you to become an unstoppable force to defeat the hordes of hell.

How it plays?

Pick a character, fight against hordes of enemies in various maps, collect loot, level up your character, upgrade your weapons and survive long enough to face the final boss.

Features and content list

  • 9 characters each with a unique weapon and ability

  • 75+ weapons and items to create your character build and synergies with. Weapons fire automatically however you have the option to manually aim your primary weapon

  • 20+ consumables (instant single-use items) can be picked up and used when needed

  • 14 maps with typically short runs (~15-20min). 6 endless maps with global leaderboards and a custom weekly map to compete in

  • 10+ buildings you can interact with on the map. Various missions, events and changing weather keep you busy and on your toes. Procedural maps make every run unique

  • 5 party members can be hired to aid you in battle

  • 25 runes that can alter the way you play your next run

  • 40+ power-ups to permanently boost your run (meta progression)

Accessible

  • Custom difficulty options are available if you find the game too easy or hard

  • Game speed can be increased if you want more fast-paced runs
